LanguageData.UB_SNS_Gambler.title: Gambler
LanguageData.UB_SNS_Gambler.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent most of [PAWN_possessive] early morning and late nights deep in the heart of the biggest casinos they could. Blackjack, Poker, Roulette, [PAWN_nameDef] played them all, and owned the green felt tops of those tables. Unfortunately, the casinos were not a very big fan of [PAWN_nameDef] and how lucky they seemed to be, ususally ending in a shootout or them being banned from playing.
